items.description: shadcn Switch wrapper that registers turnOn/turnOff semantics.

items.title: Multimodal Slider
items.description: shadcn Slider wrapper that registers value control semantics.

items.description: shadcn Tabs wrappers that register tab list and trigger semantics.

items.title: Multimodal Textarea
items.description: shadcn Textarea wrapper that registers textbox semantics.

items.title: Multimodal Select
items.description: shadcn Select wrappers that register combobox and option semantics.

items.description: shadcn Command wrappers that register search and command item semantics.

items.description: shadcn DropdownMenu wrappers that register trigger and menu item semantics.

items.title: Multimodal Sonner
items.description: shadcn Sonner wrapper that registers a toast region.
